title: Notch Apple
description: Not just Vanilla+, it's Vanilla Enhanced. The official modpack of the Notch Apple Server
body:
The NOTCH APPLE modpack is a modpack designed around the Notch Apple server. You don't need to be on the server to enjoy this pack though!

The selection of mods aims to improve performance, optimize gameplay, add new mechanics, add new structures, add new economy systems, and much much more.

There is something for EVERY type of Minecraft player here. From new exploration features to tinkering with machines to building super deatiled builds to going to space! We even have some custom mods that add a bit of overall polish and style to the pack including a location mod that adds an attractive banner displaying current location. 

Whatever thype of minecraft player you are, this modpack offers a complete and comprehensive Vanilla+ experience that wont break your computer!

Updates to this pack should remain quality of life or minimal feature updating as this pack has been vetted and tested for over a year. New mods will seldomly be added. 


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

Big thanks to https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers-fabric for being part of the modpack. 

</details>
